pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for industrial tarps and protective covers featuring the main search bar, quick links into key catalog categories (tarps by material/feature, protective covers), and CTAs for the custom tarp builder, cart, and favorites.
primary_functions: Search for products using the global search bar
Navigate quickly to main tarp and protective cover categories
Access custom tarp builder, cart, and favorites from header

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit global search form in the header or hero search bar
Click a homepage tile or CTA for 'Tarps by Material'
Click a homepage tile or CTA for 'Tarps by Feature'
Click a homepage tile or CTA for 'Protective Covers'
Click 'Build Your Custom Tarp' CTA
Click on a featured product card on the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Home' link in the global header navigation
Default landing URL when visiting the site root

pages.name: Product Catalog & Search Results
pages.description: Unified catalog and search results page showing lists of tarps and protective covers for a given category or search query. Supports all product discovery needs: keyword search results, category browsing, filters for size/price/features/ratings/shipping/usage/pallet & pack sizes, and sorting. Product cards support navigation to detail pages, favorites toggling, and optional quick add-to-cart.
primary_functions: Browse products by category (e.g., tarps by material, tarps by feature, pallet covers)
View search results for queries entered in the header search bar
Filter products by size, dimensions, material, feature (e.g., fire retardant, UV resistant), price, rating, shipping options, usage/environment, pallet size, and pack size
Sort product listings by relevance, price (low to high, high to low), and rating (high to low)
Open product detail pages in the same or new browser tabs
Add or remove products from favorites directly from product cards

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered into the global search bar, e.g., '20x30 heavy duty waterproof tarp' or 'outdoor generator cover'.
Catalog category to browse, matching Category.id (e.g., 'tarps_by_material', 'clear_poly_tarps', 'fire_retardant_tarps', 'pallet_covers'). Used by header links and category tiles.
Optional filter to restrict results to a product type, e.g., 'tarp', 'generator_cover', or 'pallet_cover'.
Human-readable tarp size filter (e.g., '20 ft x 30 ft', '12 ft x 16 ft', '16 ft x 20 ft'). Used by size filter controls.
Optional numeric width filter in feet for flat tarps; used in combination with length_ft for precise size filtering.
Optional numeric length filter in feet for flat tarps; used in combination with width_ft for precise size filtering.
Minimum price filter (inclusive) applied via the price slider/fields.
Maximum price filter (inclusive), e.g., 150 or 120, used for tasks that constrain price.
Minimum average rating required, e.g., 4.0 or 4.5, corresponding to labels like '4 stars & up'.
Feature key to filter tarps by, e.g., 'heavy_duty', 'waterproof', 'fire_retardant', or 'uv_resistant'.
Shipping filter key (e.g., 'free_shipping') to find items that qualify for free shipping.
Usage environment filter value, such as 'outdoor', particularly for items like generator covers.
Pallet length in inches used to filter pallet covers (e.g., 48 for '48 in x 40 in' pallets).
Pallet width in inches used to filter pallet covers (e.g., 40 for '48 in x 40 in' pallets).
Pack size filter for pallet covers, e.g., 25 or 50, allowing comparison of price per cover.
Sort key such as 'relevance', 'price_asc', 'price_desc', or 'rating_desc'.
Current pagination page number for the catalog results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card image or title in the catalog or search results list
Click pallet size facet for '48 in x 40 in' within the pallet covers category (reloads catalog with refined filters)

access_methods.description: Accessed via header links such as 'Tarps by Material', 'Clear Poly Tarps', 'Mesh Tarps', 'Canvas Tarps', 'Tarps by Feature', 'Fire Retardant Tarps', 'Protective Covers', and 'Pallet Covers'
Accessed when submitting search from the global search bar or when clicking category tiles that build catalog.html URLs with query and filter parameters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed product page for a single tarp or protective cover, showing images, full specifications (including size, material, thickness, and features), rating information, pack/variant options for items like pallet covers, and controls to select quantities, add to cart, or toggle favorites.
primary_functions: View full product information including size, material, thickness (mils or oz/yd�b2), features (e.g., fire retardant, UV resistance), ratings, and shipping options
Adjust quantity and add the product to the cart
Add or remove the product from favorites
View pricing for different pack sizes or variants when applicable (e.g., 25-pack vs 50-pack pallet covers)

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display. Provided when a user clicks a product card from the catalog, a featured product on the homepage, or an item in the favorites list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or equivalent CTA after adding a product to the cart
Click 'Back to Pallet Covers' breadcrumb/link on pallet cover product pages

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs such as product.html?id=PRODUCT_ID from catalog, favorites, or homepage featured sections

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page listing all standard products and custom tarps added by the user. Shows line items, quantities, prices, and subtotals, and provides controls to adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed into the checkout flow.
primary_functions: Review all items in the cart including quantities, prices, and subtotals
Update item quantities or remove items from the cart
View estimated order total before shipping and taxes
Proceed to checkout to enter shipping information and choose shipping method

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button (after beginCheckout initializes the checkout session)

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Cart' icon/link in the global header
Accessed via 'View Cart' CTAs after adding products or custom tarps to the cart

pages.name: Checkout - Shipping & Address
pages.description: First step of the checkout process where the active cart is associated with a checkout session. The user enters or confirms the shipping address, can choose to ship to a new address, and selects a shipping method such as Standard Ground before proceeding to payment.
primary_functions: Enter or confirm a shipping address including name, street, city, state, and ZIP/postal code
Choose to ship to a new address
Select a shipping method such as Standard Ground (5–7 business days)
Proceed to the payment/review step without entering payment details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue to Payment' after selecting a shipping method
Click 'Back to Cart' from the shipping step to review or edit cart contents

access_methods.description: Accessed after beginCheckout is called from the cart and the browser navigates to checkout_shipping.html for the active checkout session

pages.name: Checkout - Payment & Review
pages.description: Second step of the checkout where the user reviews the full order summary (items, quantities, shipping method, shipping address, and costs). Provides a placeholder area for entering payment information and allows navigation back to the shipping step or forward to an order completion step (beyond current task scope).
primary_functions: Review order summary including items, quantities, shipping method, and shipping address
Provide a placeholder area for entering payment information (even if not completed in the described tasks)
Allow navigation back to the shipping step or onward to order completion (not required for the current tasks)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Edit Shipping Details' or a similar link to go back and change address or shipping method
Click 'Back to Cart' from the payment/review step

access_methods.description: Accessed when the shipping step calls continueCheckoutToPayment and navigates to checkout_payment.html for the current checkout session

pages.name: Custom Tarp Builder
pages.description: Interactive configuration tool for building custom tarps with chosen material, dimensions, colors, edge finishes, grommet spacing, and corner reinforcement. Shows live pricing estimates and allows the configured custom tarp to be added as a distinct item in the cart.
primary_functions: Select tarp material (e.g., vinyl 18 oz) for custom builds
Enter custom width and length dimensions in feet
Choose tarp color (e.g., blue)
Configure finishing options such as hemmed edges, grommet spacing, and reinforced corners
Set quantity for the custom configuration
Add the configured custom tarp to the cart

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected material value (e.g., 'vinyl_18_oz') when the user clicks a 'Build this in custom size' link from a material-focused tile or category.
Optional prefilled width in feet when jumping into the builder from a specific product or size recommendation.
Optional prefilled length in feet when jumping into the builder from a specific product or size recommendation.
Optional preselected color value such as 'blue' if the builder is launched from a color-specific CTA.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding a custom tarp configuration to the cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Custom Tarps' link in the global header navigation
Accessed via 'Build a Custom Tarp' CTAs on the homepage or product/catalog pages

pages.name: Favorites / Wishlist
pages.description: Page listing all products that the user has saved to their favorites/wishlist. From here, users can review saved tarps and covers, open product detail pages, add items to cart, or remove them from favorites.
primary_functions: View a list of all products saved to favorites
Open favorite items’ product detail pages
Add favorite items to the cart from the favorites list
Remove items from favorites

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the product name or image for a saved favorite
Click 'View Cart' after adding a favorite item to the cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Favorites' link in the global header navigation

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page describing the company’s background, experience, and specialization in industrial-grade tarps and protective covers. Reinforces product quality, reliability for construction and industrial environments, and any relevant certifications.
primary_functions: Explain the company’s background and expertise in tarps and covers
Reassure users about product quality and industrial focus

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'About' link in the global footer
May be linked from external sites or marketing materials as an about-us URL

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page providing phone, email, physical address, and business hours, along with a contact form for product, order, or technical questions about tarps and protective covers.
primary_functions: Provide contact methods such as phone number, email address, and contact form
Display business hours and typical response times

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Contact' link in the global footer
The contact form on this page submits via submitContactForm but remains on contact.html with success/error messaging

pages.name: Shipping & Returns
pages.description: Policy page describing available shipping options (including Standard Ground with typical transit times) and the company’s return and exchange policies for tarps and covers.
primary_functions: Explain available shipping methods including standard ground shipping timeframes
Outline return and exchange policies for tarps and protective covers

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Shipping & Returns' link in the global footer

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page detailing how user data (including browsing behavior on the tarp catalog and checkout flow) is collected, stored, and used, along with user rights and choices regarding privacy.
primary_functions: Describe how customer data and browsing behavior are collected and used
Explain user choices and rights related to privacy

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the global footer

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Help center page containing frequently asked questions and answers about tarp materials, thickness, sizing, ordering, shipping/returns, and basic privacy topics, with links back to relevant policy pages.
primary_functions: Answer frequently asked questions about materials, thickness, and sizing (e.g., how to choose the right tarp size)
Provide troubleshooting tips for ordering and checkout issues
Link to relevant policy pages such as Shipping & Returns and Privacy Policy

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an inline link within an FAQ answer that references detailed Shipping & Returns information
Click an inline link within an FAQ answer that references detailed privacy policy information

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Help & FAQ' link in the global footer

header_links.description: Homepage with featured tarps, protective covers, and access to search
Browse tarp categories organized by material such as clear poly, mesh, and canvas
Category listing of clear poly tarps for construction and enclosure use
Category listing of mesh tarps suitable for shade and debris containment
Category listing of durable canvas tarps for construction and industrial use
Browse tarp categories organized by key features such as heavy duty, fire retardant, and UV resistant
Category listing of fire-retardant tarps, including sizes like 12x16
Category listing of protective covers, including generator covers and pallet covers
Category listing of pallet covers with filters for pallet size and pack size
Build a custom tarp with selected material, size, color, and grommet options
View products saved for later in the favorites list
View items currently in the cart and proceed to checkout

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and its industrial tarp expertise
Get in touch with questions about products or orders
Read detailed information about shipping methods and return policies
Review the website’s privacy and data handling practices
Find answers to common questions and general help information
